name: Kehas Nang Khoi
original_name: เคหาสน์นางคอย
overview:
Kung is a graceful, beautiful woman who has grown up in the slum, with a mysterious background about her birth. Due to employment obligations, Kung finds herself travelling to Kheha Nang Khoi which is located on a cliff.

She is employed as a caretaker for a mentally challenged woman who wears a mask all the time. Kung later discovers that the lady is not crazy and may be related to precious lost jewelry, "The Pink Diamond".

trailers.title: เคหาสน์นางคอย [Official Trailer]
